puzzle.title: The Divine Trust and Silent Testimony
puzzle.intro: A soul of profound devotion was chosen for an extraordinary destiny, marked by a miraculous occurrence that challenged societal norms. This individual faced immense scrutiny and hardship, yet remained steadfast in their faith, relying solely on divine intervention. Can you identify this revered figure from the Quranic account?
clues: I was dedicated to Allah's service from before my birth.
I lived in seclusion within a sanctuary, receiving sustenance directly from the Divine.
An angel appeared to me, announcing an impossible yet true glad tiding.
I conceived a child without any human contact, a sign for humanity.
When I returned to my people, they accused me of a grave offense.
My infant son spoke from the cradle to defend my honor and declare his prophethood.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: The dream of seven fat cows
The miraculous birth without a father
The temptation by Iblis in Paradise
trial.answer: The miraculous birth without a father

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Becoming a ruler of a vast kingdom
The ascension of a son to prophethood
Leading a people out of bondage
The destruction of a wicked city
outcome.answer: The ascension of a son to prophethood

puzzle.arabic: فَأَتَتْ بِهِۦ قَوْمَهَا تَحْمِلُهُۥ ۖ قَالُوا۟ يَـٰمَرْيَمُ لَقَدْ جِئْتِ شَيْـًۭٔا فَرِيًّۭا
puzzle.verse: Then she brought him to her people, carrying him. They said, "O Mary, you have certainly done a thing unprecedented. (19:27)
